features: Fruit shower gel with milk extracts and 100% natural scent helps to leave your skin soft and smooth
The shower gel will enchant you with its pleasant scent
The composition ofthe showergel takes care of your skin
1 x Original Source - Lime & Coconut Milk Shower Gel - 250ml
description: Product Description Original Source Lime & Coconut Milk shower gel with a pleasant aroma of tropical fruits gently cleanses and moisturizes the skin. Light gel forms a fragrant foam with a rich aroma. Add a fruity moisture boost to your morning shower routine with Original Source Lime & Coconut Moisturising Shower Milk. Our shower milk contains 100% natural fragrance to give you an amazing shower experience. Packed with real vegan milk extracts and natural moisturisers our Shower milks help transform your skin leaving it feeling soft and smooth. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Polyquaternium-7, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Parfum, Citrus Aurantifolia (Lime) Fruit Extract, Cocos Nucifera (Coconut) Fruit Extract, Potassium Sorbate, Propylene Glycol Dicaprylate/Dicaprate, Xanthan Gum, Sorbic Acid, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Lactic Acid, Limonene, CI 47005, CI 42090 Manufacturer Contact Information 3500 Aviator Way Manchester Business Park Manchester M22 5Tg See more
